popularStory.description: Joan Beaufort, Countess of Westmorland (c. 1379 – 13 November 1440) was the fourth of the four illegitimate children  (and only daughter) of John of Gaunt, 1st Duke of Lancaster , and his mistress, la …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Beaufort於1375年1月28日出生在法國博福特時，她的父親John of Gaunt34歲，母親Katherine de Roet24歲。她於1391年與Sir Robert Ferrers在法國安喬結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1440年11月13日在英國英格蘭越可爾豪登享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Beaufort于1375年1月28日出生在法国博福特时，她的父亲John of Gaunt34岁，母亲Katherine de Roet24岁。她于1391年与Sir Robert Ferrers在法国安喬结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1440年11月13日在英国英格兰越可爾豪登享年65岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beaufort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Beaufort . The surname Beauford is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Beaufort was born on 28 January 1375, in Beaufort, France, her father, John of Gaunt, was 34 and her mother, Katherine de Roet, was 24. She married Sir Robert Ferrers in 1391, in Anjou, France. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 13 November 1440, in Howden, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65, and was buried in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Beaufort est née le 28 janvier 1375, à Beaufort, France, son père, John of Gaunt, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Katherine de Roet, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Ferrers en 1391, à Anjou, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 novembre 1440, à Howden, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Beaufort am 28. Januar 1375 in Beaufort, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John of Gaunt 34 und ihre Mutter Katherine de Roet 24. Sie hat 1391 in Anjou, Frankreich Sir Robert Ferrers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. November 1440 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Howden, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Beaufort è nata il il 28 gennaio 1375 nel Beaufort, Francia, sua padre, John of Gaunt, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Katherine de Roet, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert Ferrers nel 1391, nel Anjou, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 13 novembre 1440, nel Howden, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Beaufort(이)가 1375년 1월 28일 프랑스 보포트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John of Gaunt(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine de Roet(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1391년 프랑스 앤조우에서 Sir Robert Ferrers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1440년 11월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 하우든에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Beaufort nasceu em 28 de janeiro de 1375, em Beaufort, França, seu pai, John of Gaunt, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Katherine de Roet, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Ferrers em 1391, em Anjou, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de novembro de 1440, em Howden, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Château de Beaufort, Anjou, Maine-et-Loi: анджоу, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.Raby-With-Keverstone, Durham: раби вит кивирстоун, дурам, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Beaufort родилась 28 января 1375 г. в местности бофорт, Франция, её отцу по имени John of Gaunt было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine de Roet, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Ferrers в 1391 г. в местности анджоу, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла 13 ноября 1440 г. в местности хоуден, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan de Beaufort nació el 28 de enero de 1375, en Beaufort, Francia, su papá, John of Gaunt, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Katherine de Roet, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Sir Robert Ferrers en 1391, en Anjou, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 13 de noviembre de 1440, en Howden, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
